name: goreleaser
description: Deliver Go binaries as fast and easily as possible

subcommands.name: b
subcommands.description: Builds the current project

options.description: Remove the dist folder before building
Load configuration from file
Builds only the specified build ids
Copy the binary to the path after the build. Only taken into account when using --single-target and a single id (either with --id or if configuration only has one build)
Amount tasks to run concurrently (default: number of CPUs)
Builds only for current GOOS and GOARCH, regardless of what's set in the configuration file
Skip the given options (valid options are: before, post-hooks, pre-hooks, validate)
Generate an unversioned snapshot build, skipping all validations
Timeout to the entire build process

subcommands.name: c
subcommands.description: Checks if configuration is valid

options.description: Quiet mode: no output

subcommands.name: completion
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell

subcommands.name: bash
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for bash

options.description: Disable completion descriptions

subcommands.name: fish
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for fish

options.description: Disable completion descriptions

subcommands.name: powershell
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for powershell

options.description: Disable completion descriptions

subcommands.name: zsh
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for zsh

options.description: Disable completion descriptions

subcommands.name: hc
subcommands.description: Checks if needed tools are installed

options.description: Configuration file
Quiet mode: no output

subcommands.name: i
subcommands.description: Generates a .goreleaser.yaml file

options.description: Load configuration from file

subcommands.name: schema
subcommands.description: Outputs goreleaser's JSON schema

options.description: Where to save the JSONSchema file

subcommands.name: r
subcommands.description: Releases the current project

options.description: Automatically sets --snapshot if the repository is dirty
Removes the dist folder
Load configuration from file
Whether to abort the release publishing on the first error
Amount tasks to run concurrently (default: number of CPUs)
Load custom release notes footer from a markdown file
Load custom release notes footer from a templated markdown file (overrides --release-footer)
Load custom release notes header from a markdown file
Load custom release notes header from a templated markdown file (overrides --release-header)
Load custom release notes from a markdown file (will skip GoReleaser changelog generation)
Load custom release notes from a templated markdown file (overrides --release-notes)
Skip the given options (valid options are announce, aur, before, chocolatey, docker, homebrew, ko, nfpm, nix, publish, sbom, scoop, sign, snapcraft, validate, winget)
Generate an unversioned snapshot release, skipping all validations and without publishing any artifacts (implies --skip=announce,publish,validate)
Timeout to the entire release process
